name: aws-blog-automation
description: AWS-native automated blog generation pipeline using Bedrock, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, EventBridge Scheduler, and GitHub Actions.

scripts.build:test: tsc --module commonjs --target ES2022 --rootDir src --outDir dist-test src/shared/slug.ts src/services/manifest.ts src/types/blog.ts
scripts.test: npm run build:test && node --test tests/slug.test.js tests/manifest.test.js
